introduce.title: What is NeonPhysics?
introduce.label: About
introduce.description: An interactive physics learning platform with 3D simulations that help students truly understand mechanics, waves, energy, and electromagnetism.

items.title: 3D Simulations
items.description: Real-time interactive physics experiments rendered in 3D. Adjust parameters and see results instantly.

items.title: Standards-Aligned
items.description: Every experiment maps to NGSS, GCSE, and AP Physics curriculum standards.

items.title: Progress Tracking
items.description: Track your learning journey with session history, challenge completion, and skill progression.

items.title: Privacy-First
items.description: GDPR and COPPA compliant. Student data is protected with age-appropriate safeguards.

benefits.title: Why NeonPhysics?
benefits.label: Benefits
benefits.description: Built for students, teachers, and curious minds who want to experience physics, not just read about it.

items.title: Learn by Doing
items.description: Manipulate variables in real-time and observe how physics works. No passive videos — pure hands-on exploration.

items.title: Built-in Challenges
items.description: Each experiment includes guided challenges that test understanding and build confidence step by step.

items.title: Works Everywhere
items.description: Runs in any modern browser. No downloads, no plugins. Works on desktop, tablet, and mobile.

usage.title: Get Started in Seconds
usage.description: No setup required. Jump straight into physics experiments:

items.title: Pick an Experiment
items.description: Browse experiments by topic — mechanics, waves, energy, or electromagnetism.

items.title: Launch the Simulation
items.description: Click to start the interactive 3D simulation. Adjust parameters with intuitive controls.

items.title: Complete Challenges
items.description: Work through guided challenges to deepen your understanding of the physics concepts.

items.title: Track Your Progress
items.description: See your learning journey, revisit experiments, and unlock advanced content.

features.title: Platform Features
features.description: Everything you need for an engaging physics learning experience.

items.title: Interactive 3D Engine
items.description: Real-time physics simulations with adjustable parameters and instant visual feedback.

items.description: Experiments mapped to NGSS, GCSE, and AP Physics standards for classroom use.

items.title: Student Privacy
items.description: GDPR and COPPA compliant with age-gating, consent management, and data retention controls.

items.title: Usage Quotas
items.description: Free tier with generous daily limits. Pro and Max tiers for unlimited access.

items.title: Learning Analytics
items.description: Track experiment sessions, challenge completion, and skill progression over time.

items.title: Multi-Language

testimonials.title: What Educators Say
testimonials.description: Hear from teachers and students using NeonPhysics in their classrooms.

items.name: Dr. Sarah Chen
items.quote: My students finally understand Newton's Laws intuitively. The 3D simulations make abstract concepts tangible in a way textbooks never could.

items.name: James Park
items.quote: I used to dread physics class. Now I spend extra time exploring experiments on NeonPhysics. It actually makes sense when you can see it happen.

items.name: Prof. Maria Santos
items.quote: The curriculum alignment is spot-on. I assign NeonPhysics experiments as pre-lab work and my students come to class already understanding the concepts.

items.name: Alex Thompson
items.quote: Finding quality physics resources for homeschooling is hard. NeonPhysics fills that gap perfectly — interactive, standards-aligned, and my kids love it.

items.name: Dr. Wei Liu
items.quote: We rolled out NeonPhysics across our entire physics department. The privacy compliance and student data protection gave us confidence to adopt it school-wide.

items.name: Emma Rodriguez
items.quote: Finally, a simulation platform that actually maps to the standards we teach. The experiment design shows deep understanding of physics pedagogy.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Have another question? Reach out via email.
faq.tip: Can't find what you're looking for? Contact us at support@neonphysics.com

items.question: What is NeonPhysics?
items.answer: NeonPhysics is an interactive physics learning platform featuring 3D simulations aligned with NGSS, GCSE, and AP standards. Students explore mechanics, waves, energy, and electromagnetism through hands-on experiments.

items.question: Is NeonPhysics free to use?
items.answer: Yes! Free-tier users get 300 seconds of simulation time per day. Pro and Max subscriptions unlock unlimited access and advanced experiments.

items.question: What age group is NeonPhysics designed for?
items.answer: NeonPhysics is designed for students aged 13 and above. We have age-gating and COPPA compliance built in to protect younger users.

items.question: Do I need to install anything?
items.answer: No. NeonPhysics runs entirely in your browser. No downloads, plugins, or special hardware required. Works on desktop, tablet, and mobile.

items.question: Is student data safe?
items.answer: Absolutely. NeonPhysics is GDPR and COPPA compliant with consent management, data retention policies, and the ability to export or delete personal data on request.

items.question: Can teachers use NeonPhysics in the classroom?
items.answer: Yes! Experiments are mapped to curriculum standards and work great as in-class demonstrations, homework assignments, or self-paced learning activities.
